i: Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. CCND2 encodes cyclin D2, which activates CDK4/6 in G1 phase; frequently amplified in multiple myeloma and other cancers.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. CCND3 encodes cyclin D3, an activator of CDK4 and CDK6; frequently mutated in T-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. CCNE1 encodes cyclin E1, which activates CDK2 during S phase entry; amplified in high-grade serous ovarian cancer.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. CCNT1 encodes cyclin T1, which forms the P-TEFb complex with CDK9 to stimulate RNA Pol II elongation and HIV Tat-mediated transcription.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. CCNT2 encodes cyclin T2, a P-TEFb complex subunit that regulates transcription elongation.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. CTH encodes cystathionase (cystathionine gamma-lyase), the enzyme that converts cystathionine to cysteine in the transsulfuration pathway; also produces hydrogen sulfide.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. CYB561 encodes cytochrome b-561, a transmembrane electron transporter that recycles ascorbate and is involved in secretory vesicle function.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. COX5B encodes cytochrome c oxidase subunit 5B, a nuclear-encoded subunit of the mitochondrial respiratory chain complex IV.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. DCTD encodes dCMP deaminase, which converts dCMP to dUMP in pyrimidine metabolism.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. DCTN5 encodes dynactin subunit 5 (p25), a component of the dynactin complex that facilitates cytoplasmic dynein-mediated cargo transport.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. DENND1B encodes DENN domain-containing protein 1B, a guanine nucleotide exchange factor (GEF) for RAB35 involved in endosomal trafficking.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. DHH encodes Desert Hedgehog, a hedgehog signaling ligand essential for Sertoli cell-dependent testis development; mutations cause partial gonadal dysgenesis.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. DEFB1 encodes defensin beta-1, an antimicrobial peptide constitutively expressed in epithelial cells of the respiratory, urinary, and GI tracts.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. DGUOK encodes deoxyguanosine kinase; mutations cause mitochondrial DNA depletion syndrome (hepatocerebral form).

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. DPT encodes dermatopontin, an extracellular matrix protein in skin dermis that interacts with decorin and TGF-beta.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. DSG2 encodes desmoglein-2, the main desmoglein in cardiac desmosomes; mutations cause arrhythmogenic right ventricular cardiomyopathy (ARVC).
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. DSTN encodes destrin (ADF/cofilin family), an actin-depolymerizing protein that regulates actin dynamics.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. DPYS encodes dihydropyrimidinase, which catalyzes the second step of pyrimidine degradation; mutations cause dihydropyrimidinuria.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FLAG: dnaS appears to be a bacterial gene name (DNA replication-associated), not a standard human gene. This entry may be incorrectly placed in the human health domain.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FLAG: 'Doublesex' is the Drosophila melanogaster sex determination gene (dsx). The human functional homolog is DMRT1. 'Doublesex' is not a standard human gene name and this entry may be incorrectly placed.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. DSCAML1 encodes Down syndrome cell adhesion molecule-like 1, a neural cell adhesion protein in the IgSF superfamily.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. Duodenal cytochrome B (DCYTB/CYBRD1) is a membrane-bound ferrireductase that reduces Fe3+ to Fe2+ to facilitate dietary iron absorption in the duodenum.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. EPN2 encodes epsin-2, a clathrin-associated adaptor protein involved in endocytosis and vesicle formation.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. ETM2 (essential tremor mapped locus 2) refers to a chromosomal region linked to familial essential tremor; the specific causative gene has not been definitively established.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. Note: EXT3 is a proposed locus for hereditary multiple osteochondromas, but it has not been established as a distinct validated gene separate from EXT1/EXT2.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. EVPL encodes envoplakin, a component of the cornified envelope in stratified squamous epithelia; part of the desmosome-intermediate filament network.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. EFNA5 encodes ephrin-A5, a membrane-anchored ligand for Eph tyrosine kinase receptors involved in axon guidance and topographic mapping.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. VEGFC encodes vascular endothelial growth factor C, which promotes lymphangiogenesis by activating VEGFR-3; a key target in lymphedema research.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. ESRRG encodes estrogen-related receptor gamma, an orphan nuclear receptor involved in energy metabolism and kidney development.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. ESRRA encodes estrogen-related receptor alpha, an orphan nuclear receptor that regulates mitochondrial biogenesis and energy metabolism.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. ESRRB encodes estrogen-related receptor beta, an orphan nuclear receptor important for placental development and stem cell pluripotency.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. EIF4E encodes eukaryotic translation initiation factor 4E, the rate-limiting cap-binding protein in mRNA translation; overexpressed in many cancers.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FAAH encodes fatty acid amide hydrolase, which degrades endocannabinoids including anandamide; a therapeutic target for pain and anxiety disorders.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FGF16 encodes fibroblast growth factor 16, expressed in the heart and adipose tissue; involved in cardiomyocyte proliferation.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FGF21 encodes fibroblast growth factor 21, a liver-derived endocrine hormone that regulates glucose and lipid metabolism; a therapeutic target for NASH and metabolic syndrome.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. Flt3l (FLT3LG) encodes FLT3 ligand, a growth factor that expands dendritic cell and hematopoietic progenitor populations.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FOSL2 encodes Fos-related antigen 2 (Fra-2), an AP-1 transcription factor subunit; involved in osteoclast differentiation and inflammation.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FZD9 encodes frizzled class receptor 9, a Wnt receptor that mediates Wnt5b signaling; deleted in Williams-Beuren syndrome region.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FGA encodes fibrinogen alpha chain; mutations cause dysfibrinogenemia or afibrinogenemia leading to bleeding disorders.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FGB encodes fibrinogen beta chain; mutations cause dysfibrinogenemia or renal amyloidosis (fibrinogen Aα-chain amyloidosis).

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FAP encodes fibroblast activation protein alpha, a serine protease expressed on activated cancer-associated fibroblasts; a target for FAP-directed cancer imaging and therapy.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FGFR4 encodes fibroblast growth factor receptor 4, a tyrosine kinase receptor; variants affect sensitivity to FGF19-FGFR4 pathway inhibitors in hepatocellular carcinoma.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FLAG: 'fis' is an E. coli transcription factor gene (factor for inversion stimulation), not a human gene. This entry is incorrectly placed in the human health domain.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FEN1 encodes flap structure-specific endonuclease 1, which removes RNA primers and flap structures during DNA replication and repair.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FMO1 encodes flavin-containing monooxygenase 1, a drug-metabolizing enzyme important in fetal liver that N-oxygenates trimethylamine and various drugs.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FOXL2 encodes forkhead box L2 transcription factor, essential for ovarian granulosa cell maintenance; somatic mutations cause adult granulosa cell tumors.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FOXC1 encodes forkhead box C1 transcription factor; mutations cause Axenfeld-Rieger syndrome (glaucoma and anterior segment dysgenesis).

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FPR2 encodes formyl peptide receptor 2, a GPCR that responds to bacterial formyl peptides and anti-inflammatory lipid mediators (lipoxins).
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. FPR3 encodes formyl peptide receptor 3, expressed on dendritic cells and involved in chemoattractant sensing.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Expanded distractors from 6 to 8 items. Fragile Mental Retardation 2 (FMR2/AFF2) is an X-linked gene whose expansion of CCG repeats causes FRAXE fragile X syndrome, a mild form of X-linked intellectual disability.
